summary: PR #2252 decompiled the Home-Run Contest stage function grHomeRun_8021ED74, replacing the placeholder with a small typed implementation that prepares a BobOmbRain struct, derives a Vec3 from a JObj via lb_8000B1CC, and calls it_8026BE84. The header prototype was updated from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void(void), and the item header it/it_26B1.h was included. PR evidence reports a clean ninja build, fuzzy_match_percent 100.0, and bot output showing one new 96-byte match for main/melee/gr/grhomerun::grHomeRun_8021ED74.

key_files.role: Replaced the grHomeRun_8021ED74 placeholder with the matched C implementation and added the it/it_26B1.h include for BobOmbRain/it_8026BE84 usage.
Updated the grHomeRun_8021ED74 declaration from unknown return/params to the recovered void(void) signature.

what_changed: Implemented grHomeRun_8021ED74(void) in src/melee/gr/grhomerun.c, declaring BobOmbRain bobomb_rain and HSD_JObj* jobj = Ground_801C2CF4(0x7F).
Initialized BobOmbRain fields x0, x4, x14, x18, and x1C.b0 before computing x8_vec with lb_8000B1CC(jobj, NULL, &bobomb_rain.x8_vec).
Called it_8026BE84(&bobomb_rain) to use the prepared BobOmbRain data.
Updated src/melee/gr/grhomerun.h prototype for grHomeRun_8021ED74 from UNK_RET grHomeRun_8021ED74(UNK_PARAMS) to void grHomeRun_8021ED74(void).
smart_moves: Kept the recovered signature synchronized between the implementation and the owning header instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS in the public declaration.
Used the existing BobOmbRain type and item API rather than representing the item spawn/configuration through raw pointer arithmetic in the shown diff.
Kept the match focused to one stage function plus the necessary include/prototype changes.

decomp_lessons.title: Update the owning header when a matched body proves a formerly unknown signature.
decomp_lessons.text: This PR replaced both the body placeholder and the grhomerun.h declaration for grHomeRun_8021ED74 with void(void), matching the truthful-headers standard for recovered signatures.

decomp_lessons.title: Prefer recovered typed item parameter structs over raw offset code when the struct type is available.
decomp_lessons.text: The implementation uses BobOmbRain fields and passes &bobomb_rain to it_8026BE84 rather than using opaque M2C_FIELD-style access in the PR diff.

naming_conventions.name: bobomb_rain
naming_conventions.lesson: A local BobOmbRain instance is named after its type/role using lowercase snake case, making the item configuration role clear without inventing a broader semantic name.

naming_conventions.name: jobj
naming_conventions.lesson: The HSD_JObj* returned by Ground_801C2CF4 is named jobj, consistent with short role names for clear local object roles.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Small typed struct initialization to match a 96-byte function
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The matched function is expressed as explicit field assignments on a stack BobOmbRain struct, then uses lb_8000B1CC to fill x8_vec and it_8026BE84 to consume the struct. Bot output reports +96 bytes and 100.00% for grHomeRun_8021ED74.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Verification claimed by PR author and bot report
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The PR body claims ninja builds clean and fuzzy_match_percent: 100.0; decomp-dev bot reports one new match for grHomeRun_8021ED74 from 0.00% to 100.00%. Intake did not independently rerun verification.

notes: The diff is small, complete, and directly shows all code/header changes.
The PR body and bot comment provide matching/build evidence, but intake did not independently verify ninja, objdiff, or fuzzy matching.
No review comments or reviewer discussion were present in the loaded slice, so review feedback is empty.
The raw PR JSON is truncated, but the needed metadata, diff, changed files, PR body, and bot comment are available elsewhere in the loaded evidence.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recovered function signatures should be propagated to owning headers
accepted_candidate_records.text: When a decompiled body proves a formerly unknown function has void return and no parameters, update the owning header prototype along with the source definition instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use typed item parameter structs for item-spawn helper calls
accepted_candidate_records.text: For grHomeRun_8021ED74, a stack BobOmbRain struct with explicit field initialization was sufficient for a reported 100% match before calling it_8026BE84.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize the magic value 0x7F or BobOmbRain field meanings beyond this PR; the slice shows the assignments but does not explain the semantic purpose of each field.
Do not treat the Claude Code note as evidence of authored-source style or reviewer approval; it only appears in the PR body footer.
No reviewer intent or requested changes can be inferred because no review comments were loaded.
